solution: 
```cpp
class Solution {
public:
    string reverseStr(string s, int k) {
        for (int i = 0; i < s.length(); i += 2 * k) {
            int left = i;
            int right = min(i + k - 1, (int)s.length() - 1);
            while (left < right) {
                swap(s[left], s[right]);
                left++;
                right--;
            }
        }
        return s;
    }
};
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: <Iterate through the string in steps of 2k. For each segment, reverse the first k characters. If fewer than k characters remain, reverse all remaining characters. This approach is efficient as it performs in-place reversal and processes each character at most once.>
